payload.note: The case presents an individual, Tareck Joseph, being onboarded with a match to Tareck El Aissami in the SDN list. While entity type support is present, there are critical contradictions: geography mismatch (US vs VE), lack of supporting date of birth and identifiers for the matched party, which necessitate an analyst investigation to resolve these discrepancies before closure.

Country mismatch between US (screened) and VE (matched)
Hard contradiction in geography, date, and identifiers requires analyst confirmation
